description: Inkpunk Diffusion — ink/punk illustration style fine-tune of SD 1.5 (DreamBooth)
_comment: DreamBooth fine-tune by Envvi. Vaguely inspired by Gorillaz, FLCL, and Yoji Shinkawa.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: include 'nvinkpunk' in every prompt (the DreamBooth subject token).
_comment_prompt: Examples: 'nvinkpunk portrait of a warrior', 'nvinkpunk robot in a city', 'nvinkpunk woman with flowing hair'.
_comment_negative: Suggested: 'deformed, ugly, blurry, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn face, mutation'.
_comment_steps: 50 steps gives cleaner results than 30 for DreamBooth fine-tunes; SD 1.5 model card uses 50 PLMS.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7–8 per SD 1.5 evaluations. Lower (5–6) gives a looser, more painterly result.
_comment_size: SD 1.5 native resolution is 512x512. Larger sizes (640x640, 768x768) work but may produce distortions.
